query: SELECT COUNT(*) as remaining FROM products WHERE imageUrl LIKE '%cloudfront.net%' OR imageUrl LIKE '%amazonaws.com%' UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subcategories WHERE imageUrl LIKE '%cloudfront.net%' OR imageUrl LIKE '%amazonaws.com%';
